docs.title: Cassian — Merchant Prince

docs.description: Verdant Covenant: a private Forest network, defensive terrain, attrition wars.

docs.title: Seraphel — Lord of the Arcane
docs.description: Arcanum Concord: virtual sigils, paired Research actions, Arcane tempo.

docs.title: Vharok — Lord of Steel
docs.description: Iron Dominion: every built hex becomes a bastion, durable fronts, long sieges.

docs.title: Rakhis — The Sandlord
docs.description: Windsworn Horde: ZOC-free movement, desert mastery, hit-and-run raids.

docs.title: Nyxara — The Veiled
docs.description: The Silent Court: Whisper manipulation, espionage, surgical strikes.

docs.title: Auriel — Voice of the World Tree
docs.description: Radiant Accord: sanctified motions, doubled votes, Renown, defensive auras.

docs.title: Thal'rik — The Gatekeeper
docs.description: The Threshold: portal control, teleportation, map-wide presence.

docs.title: Serathis — The Tidecaller
docs.description: The Drowned Court (expansion roster): lakes as fortresses, water movement, bridge control.

docs.title: Morvane — The Deathless
docs.description: The Pale Legion (expansion roster): necromancy, raising the fallen, population sacrifice.

docs.title: Tsuvara — Mother of Wagons
docs.description: The Endless Caravan (expansion roster): a mobile home city, migration, adaptability.

docs.title: Ozren — The Unveiled Flame
docs.description: The Ashen Creed (expansion roster): conversion, Influence warfare, religious schism.
